rule: Every canonical line item must carry an active HB internal cost code.
Every estimate must use exactly one approved Commercial or Multifamily template in MVP.
Every bid package must have at least one scope definition and one owner role.
Every carried VendorBid must have bid amount, scope status, qualification summary, and leveling status.
Alternates must state carried/not-carried status and link to affected scope/cost code where applicable.
Allowances must state owner, amount, scope basis, and included/excluded downstream behavior.
Custom sections must be classified as canonical, template-optional, scratchpad, or reference-only.
External workbook formulas are not authoritative in MVP and require static value snapshot or human review.
Frozen handoff baseline cannot be edited; corrections require a new correction snapshot.
HBI summaries require source row/document lineage and may not price work or recommend award without human review.
